title: ctenitis nervata
intro: Ctenitis nervata is a plant species within the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly known as the wood fern or ctenitis fern, native to Asia and parts of the Pacific region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and inflammation due to its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties. The health benefits of Ctenitis nervata include reducing pain and swelling, improving respiratory function, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and can also be found in modern supplements and extracts.
